summary: Complete testing of CosyCasa rebranding from ORSO RS. All features verified working: Homepage, Navbar, Footer, Properties page, Conciergerie page, Contact page, Blog SEO pages (Lecci, Pinarello, Corse), Admin panel, Language switching (FR/EN/ES/IT), and all backend APIs.

minor.issue: Root endpoint still returns 'ORSO RS API' message - this is internal and acceptable per agent_to_agent_context_note

critical_code_review_comments: All visible branding correctly shows 'Cosy Casa' - no ORSO RS branding visible to users
CSS class names like .orso-container are internal and acceptable to keep
All Beds24 properties are currently hidden (is_active: false) - public properties page shows mock data
Admin can enable properties via the admin panel

homepage.details: Hero section, Welcome section, Owner section, Traveler section, Testimonials section, Blog section all load correctly with CosyCasa content

navbar.details: CosyCasa logo (/cosycasa-logo.png), nav links (Accueil, Nos Locations, Conciergerie, Contact), language switcher (FR/EN/ES/IT), Réserver button all present

footer.details: CosyCasa branding, contact info (contact@cosycasa.fr, +33 6 15 87 64 70), social links (Instagram, Facebook) all present

properties_page.details: URL /locations-vacances-cosy-casa loads correctly, shows 4 mock properties (Beds24 properties are hidden), category filters work

conciergerie_page.details: URL /conciergerie loads with offers and advantages sections

contact_page.details: URL /contact loads with CosyCasa contact info and working form

navigation.details: All nav links work correctly, navigation between pages is smooth

language_switching.details: FR/EN/ES/IT all work correctly, content changes appropriately

admin_page.details: URL /admin loads, password 'orso2024' works, dashboard shows 17 Beds24 properties (all hidden), tabs for Properties/Images/PDF Services work

no_orso_branding.details: No 'ORSO RS' branding visible in any user-facing text

api_properties.details: /api/properties returns property data correctly (0 public, 17+ with include_hidden=true)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Beds24 synced properties and mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CosyCasa rebranding is complete. All Beds24 properties are synced but hidden (is_active: false). Admin can enable them via /admin panel. Mock data is shown on public properties page. All URLs preserved for SEO: /, /conciergerie, /locations-vacances-cosy-casa, /contact, /conciergerie-cosy-casa-a-lecci, /conciergerie-cosy-casa-a-pinarello, /conciergerie-cosy-casa-a-corse. Multilingue FR/EN/ES/IT working.
